case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. JOSE G. RIOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARCOS PENA--SALES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
